items.title: Wayfair Q3 Strength Confirms Bullish Reversal as Tailwinds Align for 2026
items.author: Thomas Hughes
items.description: Wayfair reported strong Q3 results with 8% revenue growth, improved cash flow, and positive analyst outlook for 2026, driven by potential rate reductions and consumer resilience.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Q3 results exceeded expectations with 8% revenue growth, 220% increase in adjusted EPS, improved cash flow, and strong analyst ratings with price target raised to $105
Improved revenue guidance for holiday quarter, indicating potential positive market conditions
Anticipated strength in organic sales and favorable Q4 guidance
Mentioned in context of potential Q4 performance, no specific details provided

items.title: It’s Time to Go on the Defensive in This Market
items.description: Defensive stocks have been underperforming the market for too long—and they also look reasonably valued. Signs of a comeback are popping up.

items.title: 20 Years on Wall Street Taught Me: Dividend Blue-Chips You Never Sell
items.description: These are the kind of stocks that growth and income investors can buy now, tomorrow, next week, or next year and hold for the long term.
